channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: WNBA has just 1 Black head coach but more could come from a pool of strong assistants in the league
item.description: The WNBA has been praised in the past as a leader for its diversity hiring practices. That hasn't changed, but some things have. At the end of the 2022 season, half of the 12 head coaches in the league were Black.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: All aboard! Mets and Yankees only 2 stops away from first Subway Series in 24 years
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Two stops away from a Subway Series. When the New York Yankees advanced to the American League Championship Series on Thursday night, that put both Big Apple teams in baseball's final four for the first time in 24 years.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former Dodgers pitcher Trevor Bauer sues accuser, says she broke settlement terms
item.description: Trevor Bauer, the former Los Angeles Dodgers pitcher and Cy Young Award winner whose career was upended by sexual assault allegations is reportedly suing his accuser for violating their settlement agreement. According to a TMZ report on Friday, the 33-year-old L.A.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Todd Downing tasked with helping Aaron Rodgers and Jets' struggling offense after 'unique week'
item.description: FLORHAM PARK, N.J. (AP) — Aaron Rodgers and the New York Jets' offense appeared on their way toward the efficient, high-scoring and productive force they fully expected they'd be this season. A lot has certainly changed in the last three weeks.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Deion Sanders rips TV executives for Colorado’s late matchup vs Kansas State: ‘Half of America is asleep’
item.description: Colorado coach Deion Sanders is coming off a bye week well-rested for Saturday's game against Kansas State, but a late kickoff has the former NFL star asking, "Who does that to us?"
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Oklahoma and Texas, one of college football's most storied rivalries, opens new chapter in the SEC
item.description: NORMAN, Okla. (AP) — Perhaps the only way the Oklahoma-Texas rivalry could have become even more intense happened when both joined the powerful Southeastern Conference in July. The series that began in 1900 immediately will rank with the best of the SEC’s older ones -- Alabama vs.
item.dc:creator: CLIFF BRUNT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: US ski star Shiffrin to skip downhills in upcoming season as she nears milestone of 100 career wins
item.description: SALZBURG, Austria (AP) — American ski star Mikaela Shiffrin won’t race downhills in the upcoming World Cup season in which she aims for her 100th career win.
item.dc:creator: ERIC WILLEMSEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Minnesota Lynx win wild Game 1 of the WNBA Finals
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — On a night that WNBA Commissioner Cathy Engelbert announced the Finals would go to a best-of-seven format next season, this year's championship opener was one of the wildest games in playoff history.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL officials' missed call during 49ers-Seahawks game bewilders fans
item.description: NFL officials puzzled fans and players alike on Thursday night over a missed call during a game between the Seattle Seahawks and San Francisco 49ers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Brock Purdy throws for 3 TDs and the 49ers beat the Seahawks 36-24 to move atop division
item.description: SEATTLE (AP) — Deebo Samuel didn't hesitate when he was asked what was working for the San Francisco 49ers. “Brock Purdy,” Samuel said. Purdy threw for 255 yards and three touchdowns, and the Niners never trailed in a 36-24 victory over the Seattle Seahawks on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rays say it may take 'weeks' to fully assess damage at Tropicana Field, after Milton struck region
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rays said it may take weeks to fully assess how much damage was done to Tropicana Field, which saw its roof ripped to shreds by the force of Hurricane Milton as the deadly storm barreled across much of Florida. The team said no one was injured when the St.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Be careful when buying Dodgers-Padres NLDS Game 5 tickets online, USAA says
item.description: Friday night will bring the biggest baseball game in Los Angeles in years as the San Diego Padres visit the Dodgers for a winner-take-all Game 5 in the National League Division Series. And the high stakes are bringing high ticket prices.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Giancarlo Stanton hits go-ahead homer in the eighth, Yankees beat Royals 3-2 in Game 3 of the ALDS
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Giancarlo Stanton hit a go-ahead homer in the eighth inning amid a battle of bullpens, and the New York Yankees beat the Kansas City Royals 3-2 on Wednesday night in Game 3 of their AL Division Series at Kauffman Stadium.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: PGA Golfers impressed with Black Desert Resort
item.description: IVINS, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The PGA Tour returns to Utah for the first time since 1963 when the Black Desert Championship tees off Thursday in Ivins, Utah. Most of the 132 golfers in the tournament have never played in Utah before, and they have been impressed with the course at Black Desert Resort.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: California lawmakers write letter urging schools to pay athletes directly
item.description: (KRON) -- A pair of California state senators wrote a letter on Wednesday urging schools in the Golden State to change how collegiate athletes are paid.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Ahead of team's game in London, Bears president says he remains steadfast on proceeding with plans for new lakefront stadium
item.description: WARE, England (AP) — The Bears remain focused on the city’s lakefront as the location for a nearly $5 billion stadium development project, team president and CEO Kevin Warren reiterated Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Blackhawks' rally falls short in season-opening 5-2 loss in Utah
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — The Utah Hockey Club got off to a great start in its new hometown Tuesday night. The Blackhawks' start, meanwhile, was less than ideal. Utah never trailed in a season opener, building a 3-0 lead before holding off a Chicago rally for a 5-2 victory.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Mets take 2-1 series lead over rival Phillies
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Six months of success for the Philadelphia Phillies could be wiped out before the leaves start to turn. With one more loss to the New York Mets, a 95-win regular season would become an afterthought.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Where to watch Padres vs. Dodgers NLDS Game 3
item.description: The San Diego Padres and the Los Angeles Dodgers will meet again in Game 3 of the best-of-five National League Division Series Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Jets fire head coach Robert Saleh after a 2-3 start to the season, AP source says
item.description: The New York Jets have fired head coach Robert Saleh after the team's 2-3 start in his fourth season, a person familiar with the decision told The Associated Press. Saleh was 20-36 as coach of the Jets, who are trying to snap the NFL's longest active playoff drought at 13 seasons.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: LeBron and son Bronny James play together for the first time in a preseason game for the Lakers
item.description: PALM DESERT, Calif. (AP) — LeBron James grew up without a father, and the top scorer in NBA history has often said he savors every moment and milestone he can experience with his own three children.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: The Big Sho: Ohtani hits tying 3-run homer in playoff debut for the Los Angeles Dodgers in NLDS win
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani rewrote the record book during his first season with the Los Angeles Dodgers. Now, he's getting a chance to make more history in his highly anticipated playoff debut.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5
